'''mabapa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:doberge|doberge]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-b-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:doberge|doberge]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| mabapa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:mæbæpæth|mæbæpæth]] || [[word:mæbæpæj|mæbæpæj]] || [[word:mæbæpæsh|mæbæpæsh]] || [[word:mæbæpæ|mæbæpæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:mababapath|mababapath]] || [[word:mababapaj|mababapaj]] || [[word:mababapash|mababapash]] || [[word:mababapa|mababapa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:mabapath|mabapath]] || [[word:mabapaj|mabapaj]] || [[word:mabapash|mabapash]] || [[word:mabapa|mabapa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:mabafpafth|mabafpafth]] || [[word:mabafpafj|mabafpafj]] || [[word:mabafpafsh|mabafpafsh]] || [[word:mabafpaf|mabafpaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:mabapatha|mabapatha]] || [[word:mabapaja|mabapaja]] || [[word:mabapasha|mabapasha]] || [[word:mabapaka|mabapaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:mabapath|mabapath]] || [[word:mabapaj|mabapaj]] || [[word:mabapash|mabapash]] || [[word:mabapa|mabapa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:mabapathal|mabapathal]] || [[word:mabapajal|mabapajal]] || [[word:mabapashal|mabapashal]] || [[word:mabapakal|mabapakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:mabapaathatha|mabapaathatha]] || [[word:mabapaajaja|mabapaajaja]] || [[word:mabapaashasha|mabapaashasha]] || [[word:mabapaaka|mabapaaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:mabapathan|mabapathan]] || [[word:mabapajan|mabapajan]] || [[word:mabapashan|mabapashan]] || [[word:mabapakan|mabapakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:mabapathaoro|mabapathaoro]] || [[word:mabapajaoro|mabapajaoro]] || [[word:mabapashaoro|mabapashaoro]] || [[word:mabapakaoro|mabapakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1a7b009}}
